$toDelete = @(
    # Exact duplicates (same size)
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\策未来_未来教育品牌旗下全国职业教育培训网校_未来教育是一家研究计算机等级考试、英语等级考试、医学考试、日语考试的教育机构，提供给考生最新考试资讯、考试动态、报名查分、模拟试题、在线咨询、最新考试题库购买，为考生提供最全面的帮助! (1).mp4",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\KHY-Quant-android-release (1).apk",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\S22631742820+孔浩原-基于量化交易策略的企业财务绩效研究 ——以螺纹钢主力合约为例 (1).docx",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\tnix-main (1).zip",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\22631742820孔浩原 开题报告 (1).htm",
    # 0 KB empty files
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\README (1).md",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\KHY-Quant-Setup-8.0.0 (1).exe",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\KHY-Quant-Setup-8.0.0 (2).exe",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\KHY-Quant-Setup-8.0.0 (3).exe",
    # Smaller duplicates (keep the larger one)
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\claude-code-main (1).zip",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\基于Vue和Agent的量化交易系统的设计与实现-孔浩原 (1).docx",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\clean_original_sessions(1).py",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\clean_original_sessions (1).py",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\我的志愿表-20260627 (1).xlsx",
    "C:\Users\25789\Downloads\我的志愿表-20260627 (2).xlsx"
)

# TASK zip - different sizes, ask user later (skip for now)

$deleted = 0
$skipped = @()
foreach ($f in $toDelete) {
    if (Test-Path $f) {
        $sizeKB = [math]::Round((Get-Item $f).Length / 1KB, 0)
        Remove-Item -Path $f -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
        if (Test-Path $f) {
            $skipped += "删除失败: $(Split-Path $f -Leaf)"
        } else {
            $deleted++
            Write-Host "✓ $(Split-Path $f -Leaf)  ($sizeKB KB)"
        }
    } else {
        Write-Host "~ 不存在: $(Split-Path $f -Leaf)"
    }
}

Write-Host "`n=== 结果 ==="
Write-Host "成功删除: $deleted 个文件"
if ($skipped) { $skipped | ForEach-Object { Write-Warning $_ } }

Write-Host "`n--- 未自动清理（大小不同，需确认） ---"
Write-Host "TASK-20260327-07043E.zip (1).zip (15579 KB) vs TASK-20260327-07043E.zip (14835 KB) — 内容可能不同"
Write-Host "我的志愿表-20260627.xlsx (5 KB) — 保留的最小版，另外两副本已删"

foreach ($f in $check) {
    if (Test-Path $f) {
        $sizeKB = [math]::Round((Get-Item $f).Length / 1KB, 0)
        $stillExist += [PSCustomObject]@{ Name = Split-Path $f -Leaf; SizeKB = $sizeKB; Type = "保留" }

    }
}
